titleStmt.title: SII 26.374: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 374. (A.R. No. 353 of 1909.) OLAKKŪR, TINDIVANAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the same temple.
This inscription is incomplete and it contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pūmēvi vaḷar tiruppoṉ, etc., and mentions the queen Buvaṉamuḻuduḍaiyāḷ.

It states that Irājēndradēvar gave 100 kaḻañju of gold for raising a stone structure (tirukkaṟṟaḷi) to the god Tiruvagattīśvaramuḍaiya-mahādēvar of Ulakkaiyūr alias Irājamahēndranallūr in Ōymā-nāḍu alias Vijaiyarājēndravaḷanāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam. The money was entrusted to ūr of the place. Of this a sum of 50 kaḻañju was expended to raise the structure up to the level of the paṅchāṅga. The structure remained unfinished thereafter, because the balance of 50 kaḻañju was otherwise spent out in course of time. When the artisans and the Śrī-Māhēśvaras demanded that the stone structure should be finished, the ūr people were not able to do that. To make good the loss a sum of 20 kaḻañju of poṉ was spent to set up an image of the god Umāskandasahita in the temple as it lacked one. Then the inscription proceeds to refer to a gift of two vēli of land as dēvadāna to provide for the services in the temple, but stops.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmevivaḷar tiruppoṉ [ puṇara nāmevu kalaimakaḷ nalam peritu ciṟappa vijaiyamāmakaḷ velpuyat tiruppa Icaiyum celviyum Eṇṭicai viḷaṅka nirupar vantiṟaiñca niṇila maṭantaiyait tirumaṇam puṇarntu cirvaḷar tarum maṇimuṭi] kavitteṉa maṇimuṭi cūṭi mallai ñālattup palluyirellāmellaiyi liṉpamiṉituṭaṉ viḷaippa vāḻi pallūḻi Āḻinaṭappa cempoṉ virasiṁhāsaṉattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya korājakecaripanmarāna tribhuvaṉaśśakravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu Añcāvatu
jeyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Oymānāṭāṉa vijaiyarājentravaḷanāṭṭu Ulakkaiyūrāna Irājamahentranallūrt tiruvakattiśvaramuṭaiya mahādevarkku tirukkaṟṟaḷi Eṭukkaikku Irājentratevar Ivvūr Ūrom pakkal tanta pon nūṟṟuk kaḻañcuṅkaikkoṇṭu tirukka
ṟṟaḷi pañcāṅkattaḷavum ceytu paṇiyaṟutta pon Aimpatiṉ kaḻañcum pokki nikkippoṉ Aimpatiṉ kaḻañcuṅ kāla virotattālantarappaṭṭa pinpu tirukkaṟṟaḷi ceyamāṭṭātu kiṭantamaiyil kālum piṭāruñ ceyvārkaḷuñ śrīmāheśvararun tirukkaṟṟaḷi ceyaveṇumenṟu tuṭarntaṭattu nāṅkaḷ ceya
māṭṭāmaiyil Ipponnukkuc celavāka Ikkoyilil Umāskantasahitan tiru meṉiyillāmaiyil tirumeniyeḻuntaruḷuvikka Iṭṭapon Irupatin kaḻañcum Ittevarkkut tevatānamāka viṭṭa Ivvūr Eri Etirvāyil vaḷḷaivāyil nikki nivantan nellai muṟṟukkuṅ kollai nilam IruvelikkuIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.374 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
